textLeft.default: At Le Rouge, we believe the best bottles are the ones with a story worth sharing. Our team of seasoned sommeliers travels the world's finest wine regions — from the limestone plateaus of Burgundy to the sun-drenched valleys of Mendoza — to bring you selections that speak of terroir, craft, and character.

textRight.default: With two boutiques in the heart of Singapore's CBD, we are your trusted guide through the world of fine wine and premium spirits. Whether you're seeking a quiet evening red, a celebratory champagne, or the perfect gift, Le Rouge has the answer.
